books.title: Reading Comprehension from a Neuroplasticity Perspective

chapters.title: Chapter 1: Welcome to Your Reading Journey
chapters.text:
Welcome to your reading journey.

In this chapter, you will learn how reading comprehension helps you become a confident learner.

Try this: read one paragraph aloud, then record yourself and listen back.

chapters.title: Chapter 2: Be an Active Learner
chapters.text:
Being an active learner means you don’t just read — you think, question, and connect ideas.

Ask yourself:
- What is the main idea?
- What is the author trying to teach me?

Record yourself reading this section clearly and confidently.
